binding.title: Link TUM Live Course
binding.selectCourse: Select a TUM Live course to link
binding.noCourses: No TUM Live courses found for your account.
binding.pendingCreated: Binding created. Please authorize Artemis on TUM Live.
binding.pendingInfo: Binding pending approval. Click "Authorize on TUM Live" to open the TUM Live confirmation page, then click "Check Binding Status" when done.
binding.stillPending: Binding is still pending approval on TUM Live.
binding.revokedInfo: The TUM Live course link has been revoked. You can link another course below.

error.loadCourses: Failed to load TUM Live courses. Please try again.
error.createBinding: Failed to create the TUM Live course link. Please try again.
error.checkStatus: Failed to verify the binding status. Please try again.
error.revoke: Failed to revoke the TUM Live course link. Please try again.

streamPicker.label: Select TUM Live stream
streamPicker.noStreams: No streams found for the linked TUM Live course.

error.loadStreams: Failed to load TUM Live streams. Please try again.
